aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic online presence but lacks essential elements for strong AEO readiness, such as reviews, schema markup, and detailed content.
quick_wins: Implement schema markup to enhance search engine understanding of the business.
Encourage customers to leave Google reviews to build credibility and improve local search visibility.
Expand website content to include detailed service descriptions, keywords, and location-specific information.

gbp_analysis.found: The business has a Google Business Profile (GBP) but lacks reviews and detailed information.
gbp_analysis.summary: The GBP is incomplete and not optimized, with no reviews or detailed business description.
critical_issues: No customer reviews, which are crucial for local search ranking and trust-building.
Incomplete business information, such as hours of operation and service areas.
Lack of posts or updates to engage with potential customers.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone number) information on its website but lacks citations on other platforms.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Yellow Pages.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and directories.
Monitor and update citations regularly to maintain accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of schema markup and detailed content
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Search engines and AI crawlers due to missing structured data and insufficient content depth
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement basic schema markup for LocalBusiness and Service types
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Build authority by regularly publishing informative content, obtaining customer reviews, and engaging with the local community
